description_long: This jet ski features a streamlined, futuristic design with a dark metallic body and two large, wing-like side fins that extend outward for stability. The front is pointed and equipped with a small, orange-tipped nose, possibly for navigation or aesthetic purposes. A prominent handlebar with a yellow accent sits atop the main body, providing control for the rider. The rear section is rounded and capped with a light gray dome, likely housing the engine or propulsion system. The overall form is aerodynamic, with smooth curves and a compact build, suitable for high-speed water travel. The materials appear to be primarily metal and plastic, with some translucent elements at the rear.
description: A sleek, dark metallic jet ski with wing-like side fins, a pointed orange nose, and a yellow-accented handlebar. The rear features a rounded, light gray dome, giving it a modern, aerodynamic look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated body, orange-tipped nose, yellow-accented handlebar, and one large side fin.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed nose, symmetrical wing-like fins, and the central handlebar.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the rear dome and side fin.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the rounded gray dome, both side fins, and the back of the handlebar.
attribute_handlebar_design: Curved, single-piece handlebar with a yellow accent on top, appearing to have integrated grips and possibly control buttons.
attribute_seat_configuration: Single, elongated seat integrated into the main body, contoured for one rider, with a smooth surface and no visible seams or padding.
